resources.string: The easier part of a Zombie invasion. Zombies appear in lower amount, but still benefit from Rush rules. There is no Abomination at Blue Danger Level.
The harder part. Zombies come in greater numbers, especially at low Danger Levels. Abominations appear at Blue Danger Level.
These are Extra Activations cards. They make the Zombies less predictable and put more pressure on the Survivors.
You must select at least one deck of cards.
Survivors cannot perform Combat Actions in the Hobomination\'s Zone.
The Abominacop goes first in Targeting Priority Order.
Molotov effects in the Abominawild\'s Zone only kill the Abominawild. Other Actors are not affected and other related game effects are ignored.

DO ONE OF THE FOLLOWING:
1 - Trejobomination is on the board: 1 extra Activation.
2 - Trejo Walker is on the board: Turns into a Trejobomination.
3 - No Trejobomination or Trejo Walker is on the board: Spawn a Trejo Walker.>

DO ONE OF THE FOLLOWING:
1 - Trejobomination is on the board: 1 extra Activation.
2 - Trejo Walker is on the board: Turns into a Trejobomination.
3 - No Trejobomination or Trejo Walker is on the board: Spawn a Trejo Walker, then activate it.

- Ignores Dark Zone and Night rules for Line of Sight.\n- At the end of its Activation, remove from the board 1 Survivor it has LoS to (players choose). At the end of its next Activation, return the Survivor to the same Zone. Another Survivor is then abducted (it can be the same one).
The Chupacabra cannot be eliminated as long as it is in a Dark Zone.
Survivors cannot use the last Skill they earned through Adrenaline (does not apply to Blue Level Skills).

- Give this card to a Survivor at random.
- The Sewer Crocodile considers the designated Survivor\'s Zone as its target Zone, ignoring other Survivors.
- The Sewer Crocodile has 2 Actions.
